rationale: Race condition causing topology leak on concurrent connects; implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.

Spec doesn't address trailing '.' in SRV records; Java driver handles it conditionally, spec silent on the case.

BSON UUID regex too strict requiring v4 format; no specific BSON spec rule requires accepting non-v4 UUIDs.

createCollection passed undocumented 'strict' option to server causing error; API docs bug, not a spec conformance issue.

Concurrent connect race creating unlimited connections; implementation bug in connection locking, no spec rule violated.

Investigating whether aws4 dependency can be inlined; dependency management investigation, no spec behavior.

Making snappy dependency lazy-loaded for startup performance; internal optimization, no spec behavior change.

hasNext() transforms documents causing double transformation with next(); internal cursor implementation bug, spec doesn't define transform behavior.

Spec mandates MUST enable TCP keepalive and SHOULD set specific values; driver implementing these required defaults.
Per CMAP spec, PoolCreatedEvent must contain only non-default options; driver sends entire MongoClientOptions instance.

CI task naming update to append node version; build infrastructure change, no spec involvement.
Spec requires warning on repeated non-list URI options; driver silently accepts them without validation.
Changing TLS certificate file reading from sync to async; internal implementation improvement, no spec requirement.
withTransaction/withSession don't return user lambda result; API ergonomics improvement, no spec-defined return value rule.
Removing legacy ISO-8859-1 string support from BSON.Binary; deprecation of legacy behavior, not a spec nonconformance.
Removing legacy boolean parsing ('yes'/'no') from URI options; proactive spec alignment Improvement, not a bug fix.

Kerberos native addon compiler options and casting update; build/native dependency fix, no spec behavior.
Conflicting peer dependency version for @aws-sdk/credential-providers; packaging/dependency management issue.
Correcting GridFSBucketWriteStream to use Node.js _write/_final pattern; internal stream API adherence, not a GridFS spec rule.
